title: HANGERWORLD Box of 10 Wooden 45cm Coat Clothes Garment Hangers with Non Slip Trouser Bar (Natural)
features: Natural Wood Finish – Made from high-quality, smooth polished wood in a natural finish for a clean, elegant look.
Shoulder Notches for Straps – Built-in U-shaped notches on each side securely hold garments with straps, making them perfect for dresses, tops, and delicate clothing.
Non-Slip Trouser Bar – Sturdy wooden bar with ridged grip prevents trousers from slipping off.
360° Rotating Chrome Hook – Polished hook rotates freely for easy hanging from any angle
Multipurpose & Durable – Suitable for shirts, trousers, jackets, and more. Perfect for home or retail use.
description: Product Description Add a touch of sophistication to your wardrobe. With these smart and stylish trouser bar hangers, made from a strong maple wood with a lovely smooth varnished finish, giving it a clean and natural look. Perfect for hanging all your favourite garments such as shirts, jumpers, blouses, trousers and skirts. Space Saving These slim, space-saving hangers are perfect for creating extra space with their flat profile. Ideal for both at home and in a retail setting, the hangers are perfect for when rail space is limited. Deep Shoulder Notches U-notches deep enough to securely hold any type of garment, from summer dresses to heavy gowns. Smooth finish of the ridges ensures that the strips of fabric won't fray or catch. Hangerworld Packaging Carefully packed and presented inside our Hangerworld retail boxes which are fully recyclable. Dimensions Approximate hanger dimensions: H: 23cm x W: 45cm x T: 1.2cm Practical U-notches Top notches that ensure your clothes stay in place. Shape Keeping Shoulders Rounded shoulders to keep your garments in perfect shape. Swivel Hook Swivel hook for easier 'no fiddling' placement.
